name: aurora-ai-open-in-chat
title: Aurora AI Open In Chat
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native open in chat parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/open-in-chat.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`.
